name: Accomplishment Summary Produced
description: A Software Accomplishment Summary (SAS) is produced, showing compliance with the PSAC.
rationale: DO-178C Table A-10 obj 3: the means of compliance and evidence are provided to the certification authority, summarised in the Software Accomplishment Summary.

examples.fails: the required objective evidence is absent

source: RTCA DO-178C / EUROCAE ED-12C — Software Considerations in Airborne Systems and Equipment Certification; objectives per Annex A tables A-1 to A-10.
